title: Chapter 64
content:
Read Chapter 63 once again before reading this one if you've already read it.

~~

Chapter 64

Gulp!

Gulp!!

Gulp!!!

I swallowed Rayla's squirting juices that flowed straight into my mouth with a thirst that kept increasing with each gulp. It wasn't normal, I tell you. And on top of that...

"Ang~~"

"Heung~~~"

"Awwwooong~~~!!!"

The chorus of moans emitted by Rayla was kind of very stimulating as well. If I weren't late for my job where I had a noble lady waiting for me to plow, I would have activated the state of completion immediately to fuck Rayla's brains out.

Too bad I wasn't out of danger yet, still, so I had to keep my desires in control. Lucas still wasn't very trustworthy yet.

"Haa... Haa..."

I let Rayla gasp out loud as I licked the remnants of her juices, tearing myself from her heavenly pussy that tasted divine but contained a watermelon taste in reality, and decided to get up to leave when Julian said something that stopped me in my tracks.

"I was thinking it is time for Sandra to marry. What are your thoughts?" He asked, well, asked Rayla, but since she was out of it, I asked, "Who is courting her?"

Yeah, that's right. I was familiar with the word courting. That was the most-used word in the martial arts world.

Anyway...

"The lord's son approached me on the day of your final test. He said he spotted Sandra at your awakening ceremony and couldn't help but fall for her beauty." Julian explained before he added his own thoughts, "I think it would be for the better. Being nobles, they wouldn't have any trouble getting children from the farm."

Woah! Now those were some words that didn't belong in the same sentence.

"What did she say?" I asked the most important question.

"She says she doesn't want to yet. I don't get what she's thinking. She's already eighteen. People would have strange thoughts about her." Julian spoke as if the world were coming to an end.

Yeah, barely legal and marry her off. That was the rule of ancient times. If one wasn't married by sixteen, they were either defective or witches.

Unless they were nobles, of course. They were always pure. Like they were creations of gods themselves. Anyway, I cleared my throat and stood up.

"As a father, I think you should respect Sandra's wishes instead of anything else," I replied and left, leaving Julian speechless and his wife breathless with her tongue out of her mouth.

What a funny scene.

Anyway, as I arrived in the bathroom and cleaned myself, I couldn't help but think back to the earlier discussion. No, not the marriage one, but the baby one. The children were born on a farm. I didn't know what it was about, but there was little to no information about it in the books I had read so far.

All I knew was that children could either be purchased for ten gold every year and a family would get one gold coin every month until they reached adulthood until they reached the age of sixteen, or they could attain them by building up achievements.

Other than that, I knew nothing. Anyway, the biggest issue wasn't to worry about that. It didn't actually matter if Sandra was married off. It wasn't like her husband was going to be able to do anything, considering his dick was the size of a stub, so even then, I would be the only one to have her holes as my target practice.

The problem was the person eyeing her. It was already a bit strange that a noble asked a commoner for her daughter's hand in marriage, and that respectfully at that.

I could only devise two scenarios. Either it was the lord's trick to bind me by using the family card, or he was really in love with Sandra. Yeah, the chances of the latter being correct were not even one percent, but there was always a chance.

Anyway, I would be encountering that guy and his brother too, today for sure, so I'll get what I need out of them. Given they fell for a first circle spell despite being aura warriors told me there training in crowd control spells was close to none.

I sighed and came out to get ready. Once ready, I left the house, leaving the sisters sleeping, the men doing their own things, and Rayla still on the dining table, trying to gain control of her legs, to get the work for today done.

As I arrived, I met someone very unexpected. A girl about Sandra's age was standing in the lobby of the mansion, her expression tense, and as soon as she saw me, she said with a harsh tone, "Why are you late?"

What?

Late?

I checked the imaginary watch, and I was supposed to be here around seven. It was maybe three minutes past seven, and that was hardly late, but considering her mood, my being late was not the issue here.

"My apologies, madam," I replied.

Yep. The girl before me was the deceased lord's daughter. She was in a knight's outfit with a breastplate and a metal sheet covering her crotch and her back, a classic detail of a knight. With a sword strapped to her waist, she looked quite daunting to whoever saw her.

"How can I be of service to you?" I asked.

"Mother asked me to wait here and bring you to her as soon as you arrive. Do you know how long I've been waiting here for you?" She informed and asked.

So that was why she was angry. Given that she was against what Zara did yesterday, it was safe to assume her view of me was not that good, and now that she was also being ordered as an errand girl to wait for a commoner, it made sense why her mood was spoiled.

Mine would be too hard, I've been in her position.

"Do forgive me for being late," and not snapping your neck, "and to make it up to you, I shall massage you especially today." More like smash your pussy so hard you'll be crying Mommy for days.

"Hmph!" She harrumphed and turned to walk away. "Follow me."

She said, and I followed her. Her ass wasn't as big as her mother which was strange given she looked exactly like the younger version of her mother, but considering she still had room for growth, and given her already slightly wide hips, she was slowly getting there.

We passed a few servants on the way and soon arrived in the lady's room. As the door was opened by the soldier stationed at the door, the scene inside was made available to me.

There, on the bed, Zara was sitting without a speck of clothing. Her moderate chest and erect pink nipples were in clear sight. Her legs parted in an M shape, her pink watery pussy in view, with it being clogged by her own fingers and slight moans escaping her mouth as she tried to derive pleasure from self-discovered masturbation, but the expression on her face was anything but one of pleasure.

More like frustration.

"You're here!" She saw and quickly sat up straight before going on, moving to the edge of the bed, she assumed the same position and parted her legs and said, "Make me feel as good as yesterday."

There was desperation in her voice, but not like madness, like desperation. She was just a little backed up, I guess. It wasn't like she was a slave to pleasure, but if her desperation was any indication, she soon might be.

But that wasn't the only point.

I moved quickly, prompted by the scent of kiwi spread throughout the room, and latched my lips on her lower lips. If she was so frustrated, it meant she was annoyed too, which also meant making her wait wasn't a good decision.

And once I began to eat her, I understood what it was. Why was she so desperate and on the verge of being so annoyed?

She was going through her period.

Which meant fucking her today was out of the question lest I risk an injury. An injury on her insides wasn't going to be pleasant, and it might create apprehension about future sex as well.

"Anng~"

"Ooohhnn~~"

"Haaannn~~~"

"Hyaa~~~"

She moaned in different tones, some long and sensual, while some short and loud, indicating different stages of her pleasure. I had already had my fill of watermelon in the morning, but feeding on the kiwis was doing nothing to diminish my thirst.

Now, I didn't know about anyone else, but something was strange here. Sure, I was a fan of eating a woman out, but not to this extent. And why did they taste like fruits and were so addictive to me?

As if waiting for me to ask such a question myself, a stream of notifications from the system answered my question.

[Your body is reacting to the bloodline hidden deep inside of you]

[You have obtained a passive skill]

[Eater Lv:1 (Passive)]

[...]

[.]

~~
